chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1080 of 2024 Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Muhammad Osman Ali Hadi 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 07.03.2025 Mr. Usman Farooq, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Qasim Khan, Assistant Attorney General. O R D E R Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J:- Comments have been filed by Assistant Attorney General, stating that CNIC of mother of petitioner is blocked, therefore, the petitioner may bring his father for biometric verification and then his CNIC would be issued. 2. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the parents of petitioner have died. He will take any of his brothers and sisters to the NADRA Office for verification; and subject to such verification CNIC of the petitioner be issued in accordance with law. 3. In view of above, this petition is accordingly disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Imran
